title: gronophyllum pinangoides
intro: Gronophyllum pinangoides, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the family of plants known as Euphorbiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Borneo and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been linked to various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Gronophyllum pinangoides is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, to create remedies for various ailments, and is also valued for its timber and wood products.
